reviews.originalComment: Bila anda berlibur ke Sabang, tapi tidak ingin suara ribut dan keramaian..ini cocok. Tempatnya tersendiri, agak jauh dari kota tapi mendekati titik nol. Menyediakan sarapan, dan restoran menghadap pantai, tapi tidak untuk bermain air karena pantai berbatu.
reviews.reviewComments: If you are vacationing in Sabang but do not want the noise and crowds, this is perfect. The place is secluded, a bit far from the city but close to the zero point. It offers breakfast and a restaurant overlooking the beach, but not for swimming because the beach is rocky.

reviews.reviewTitle: Obwohl der Unfall unseren Aufenthalt überschattete, haben wir uns sehr wohl und gut aufgehoben gefüh
reviews.reviewPositives: Super Frühstück, tolle zugewandte Mitarbeiter und alles blitzblank. Auf Extra Wünsche wurde sofort eingegangen und bei einer Auseinandersetzung mit einem Rollervermieter bekam ich unerwartet sachkundige Hilfe, wodurch mir viel Geld erspart wurde.
reviews.reviewNegatives: Die Lage ist allerdings ziemlich abseits und die Zugangswege anspruchsvoll. Da es vor Ort keine gute Möglichkeiten zum Schnorcheln gab, habe ich einen Roller gemietet, womit wir einen kleinen Unfall hatten. Die anschließende Auseinandersetzung mit dem Vermieter wurde mit Hilfe des Hotelmanagers zu meinem Gunsten gelöst. Nochmal herzlichen Dank dafür.

reviews.reviewTitle: There are a few things to be careful about.
reviews.originalComment:
海岸沿いだが砂浜なく珊瑚と岩。
追加のタオルは1枚IDR50000(500円)。
朝食はバリエーション少ない。
外れたエリアで静かなのはいいが外食できるところがない。

良いところは自然が多いので(緑)
ガーデンビューでも景色は癒される。
野生の猿と豚が現れた！良い経験だった
reviews.reviewComments:
Although it is沿 the coast, there is no sandy beach, only coral and rocks. An additional towel costs IDR 50,000 (500 yen). The breakfast has limited variety. It's nice that the area is quiet, but there are no places to eat out. 

On the positive side, there is a lot of nature, so even with a garden view, the scenery is soothing. Wild monkeys and pigs showed up! It was a good experience.

Very well kept natural , clean environment ,great hospitality, staff very helpful , caring .well organised & trustworthy ( en Riandy especially) , highly recommended for highly expectations travellers and divers

reviews.reviewPositives:
入住的海景房，打开阳台就能看到海，可以直接在房间外就看到海上落日
房间每天都有人打扫，很干净
地址相对来说有点偏僻，周围只有这一个度假村，所以很清净，对喜欢安静的人来说很满意
reviews.reviewNegatives: 房间比较小，洗手间和床就一墙之隔，一个床紧挨着洗手间的墙，床在台阶上，台阶长度超出了墙边的范围，容易撞到脚

reviews.reviewComments:
4D3N stay. First time on Pulau Weh. Nice resort. Rocky beach. You should have a car to get around or made prior arrangements for a becak (rickshaw) to get around, if you stay here. 

We walked quite a bit. It was hot but manageable. Only that we were cautioned that wild boars and snakes could show up. Fortunately, our walks were when it was maybe too sunny for the animals to be out.

If I stay here again, I’ll definitely rent a car or hire a becak for my entire stay.

reviews.reviewTitle: Would definitely not recommend this place. Bad laundry service and facilities
reviews.reviewNegatives:
Would definitely not recommend this place. The photos give you a wrong impression of what it actually looks like and there are a lot of false promises in the facilities: there's no private beach, we had ants in our breakfast and the laundry service is even in European terms very expensive. We paid over 25 euros and the laundry was still dirty and wet. When we tried to solve this with the staff, they refused to take responsibility. Furthurmore,  it's a hard to reach place with a broken up driveway. Our friends stayed in the next village, got the same and paid only half the price (and a quarter for the laundry). 

Long story short: it's expensive and you don't get what you pay for.

reviews.reviewComments: Harga agak mahal.. resort tiada penyewa lain.. hanya kami 2 bilik.. mujur tak seram sbb staff nya ramai.. makanan untuk breakfast sedappp.. rasanya tak kan repeat lg hotel ni.. walaupun lokasi depan laut, staff nya bagus.. cuma terlalu sunyi..

reviews.reviewPositives: Amazing Hotel with the best Staff, very helpful and make good Food. Also the Divemaster was amzing he take us to the best Spots and he is really competently. Was a pleasure to stay at the Resort

reviews.originalComment: Bila anda berlibur ke Sabang, tapi tidak ingin suara ribut dan keramaian..ini cocok. Tempatnya tersendiri, agak jauh dari kota tapi mendekati titik nol. Menyediakan sarapan, dan restoran menghadap pantai, tapi tidak untuk bermain air karena pantai berbatu.
reviews.reviewComments: If you are vacationing in Sabang but do not want the noise and crowds, this is perfect. The place is secluded, a bit far from the city but close to the zero point. It offers breakfast and a restaurant overlooking the beach, but not for swimming because the beach is rocky.

reviews.reviewNegatives: Die Lage ist allerdings ziemlich abseits und die Zugangswege anspruchsvoll. Da es vor Ort keine gute Möglichkeiten zum Schnorcheln gab, habe ich einen Roller gemietet, womit wir einen kleinen Unfall hatten. Die anschließende Auseinandersetzung mit dem Vermieter wurde mit Hilfe des Hotelmanagers zu meinem Gunsten gelöst. Nochmal herzlichen Dank dafür.

朝食はバリエーション少ない。
外れたエリアで静かなのはいいが外食できるところがない。

良いところは自然が多いので(緑)
ガーデンビューでも景色は癒される。
野生の猿と豚が現れた！良い経験だった

On the positive side, there is a lot of nature, so even with a garden view, the scenery is soothing. Wild monkeys and pigs showed up! It was a good experience.

房间每天都有人打扫，很干净
地址相对来说有点偏僻，周围只有这一个度假村，所以很清净，对喜欢安静的人来说很满意

We walked quite a bit. It was hot but manageable. Only that we were cautioned that wild boars and snakes could show up. Fortunately, our walks were when it was maybe too sunny for the animals to be out.

Would definitely not recommend this place. The photos give you a wrong impression of what it actually looks like and there are a lot of false promises in the facilities: there's no private beach, we had ants in our breakfast and the laundry service is even in European terms very expensive. We paid over 25 euros and the laundry was still dirty and wet. When we tried to solve this with the staff, they refused to take responsibility. Furthurmore,  it's a hard to reach place with a broken up driveway. Our friends stayed in the next village, got the same and paid only half the price (and a quarter for the laundry). 

Long story short: it's expensive and you don't get what you pay for.

reviews.reviewComments: Harga agak mahal.. resort tiada penyewa lain.. hanya kami 2 bilik.. mujur tak seram sbb staff nya ramai.. makanan untuk breakfast sedappp.. rasanya tak kan repeat lg hotel ni.. walaupun lokasi depan laut, staff nya bagus.. cuma terlalu sunyi..

reviews.reviewPositives: Amazing Hotel with the best Staff, very helpful and make good Food. Also the Divemaster was amzing he take us to the best Spots and he is really competently. Was a pleasure to stay at the Resort

reviews.reviewTitle: The worst hotel that you can't sleep because of noise.
reviews.originalTitle: 騒音で眠れない最悪のホテル
reviews.originalComment:
夜中までインドネシア人家族の歌声や大声が蔓延し眠れず。
ホテルの従業員も適切に対処せず。
ダイビング専用ホテルに関わらず睡眠ができずダイビングに支障あり、二度とこのホテルに泊まることはないだろう。
reviews.reviewComments: The voices and loud noises from the Indonesian family continued until midnight, making it impossible to sleep. The hotel staff did not handle the situation appropriately. Despite being a diving hotel, I could not get any sleep, which affected my diving, and I will probably never stay at this hotel again.

The place is secluded, perfect place for you who wants to find peace. Sadly due to the pandemic the diving activities were all stopped. Too bad, at least I was able to spend my rest days in peace with no ruckus. The staffs were friendly.
The resort was nice and recommended to stay at.

reviews.reviewTitle: A quaint hotel with breathtaking view and strategic location
reviews.reviewComments: Would be excellent if there are more staff members to attend to guest's needs. The breakfast juice should have been of same standard with welcome drinks and bigger menu selection. Overall it is a great place and view to stay 👍
Super friendly and professional staff

It looks like a very nice resort to relax on the pictures but the room looks nothing like it does on the pictures. The staff only has very poor English skills, often making it impossible to communicate with them. The food in the restaurant was absolutely disgusting and not pleasant at all for the price! 

I would not recommend this place if you want to relax and lay on the beach for a few days as there is no beach close by (a 7minute drive away) and whatever there is where you can lay down is filled with plastic and trash. 

Disappointed with the performance when taking the price in account.

The moment we arrived, the view really awesome. It is located face to the sea, eventhough quite far from the jetty but worth it! The resort is near to Gua Sarang, Pulau Rubiah, Kilometer 0 and many more. Thanks to the FO staff, I can't remember his name but we managed to early check-in at approx. 1pm. The resort even prepared early breakfast for us at 6am as we need to catch the morning ferry at 8am. Thanks to Ms. Augustria to entertain us and happy birthday to you (some of us are August babies too!) 😊 Thumbs up to all of you for the warm hospitality, we have a great experience and hope to stay in your resort in future.

reviews.reviewTitle: good staff, good food, calm with stunning view
reviews.reviewComments:
if you really want a calm and peaceful place to stay and relax..this is the right hotel to choose.the room is very basic but still comfortable.it has big bed that can fit the 4 of us!even though  the beach is rocky but we managed to find a little sand area where my kids can play & swim.you need to explore a bit guys :).the water is chrystal clear. the staff name “wahyu” is very friendly and help us a lot during our stay.he made us feels like
home.he”ll try to fullfill whatever we need.the food are also very very good.good job chef.the chef even treat us with free dessert.overall we really like our stay there and loveeee to come back again.

The hotel is on its own location. It's recommended if you prefer to stay away from the crowd during peak season with your own privacy. It's consider one of the nicer accommodation among most of the places around. It just provided whatever necessary only. Breakfast too is quite basic. However, thanks to its location, we have a good rest here.
Good diving site

i choose to stay with my wife but the reception say cant if dont have document married.
so they advice to book another room . and very late night hotel go blackout for many times.  very bad hotel ever..

It is not a resort, no pool and no clean ocean view. The staff are not trained and the restaurant is very basic. The Room is very small and don't reflect the reality, Agoda must check the hotels before adding them and recommend them to customers. If you are not part of their diving program then no need to go there.
Need major improvement in room facility to justify expensive room rate
I was booked a room at this hotel for my parent who doing road trip. The hotel was very far from city and anywhere. Located in a remote area and very lonely. Breakfast was not so good.
No cupboard in the room, lighting is very poor, bathroom is extremely small, room is small for the price. Lots of ants, floor is kinda sticky.

reviews.reviewTitle: Nice from the outside, opposite from the inside
reviews.reviewComments: We were awed by its beauty when we first drove into the hotel. The tall trees and the majestic shipwreck that stands just outside the hotel. But it was quickly reversed as soon as we got in our room. It was basic, shower head dropped off, door knob too, mushroom was growing on the walls and the lighting was so bad that we had to turn on our cellphone flash light to find things in our luggage. Oh, and they only turned on the heater if it's full house. Food menu were overpriced and do not hold up to it. I won't recommend.
Helpful staff, great architecture. The location is quite far from other things on the island. But with a car or motorbike everything is easily accessible within minutes.
Hotel was nice. Food was ok. Beautiful beach

The boutique hotel and situated at a pisturistic location, however the private beach is very rocky and during our visit has high waves. We were told that during certain months the beach is calmer though. The staff is very friendly and helpful so we felt welcomed. The downside is since this is a small hotel there is not much facilities, ideally you would need to hire a car to get around
Resort is ok!
It is far from town

reviews.reviewTitle: Our room is not the beach view, it's feel isolated
reviews.reviewComments: Our room very isolated because we dont have balcony and the signal is very poor. The price is overrated because this hotel didn't have a standard 3-stars hotel. The location near with iboih beach and gapang beach so i think it's quite good.
reviews.reviewPositives: Clean, nice breakfast, suitable for honeymoon

reviews.reviewTitle: Dive resort without beach and dive package
reviews.reviewComments: The hotel is far away from everywhere (port and city), it do not have beach, the shore is rock and my kids upset cause they can not play in the beach. Sabang attraction is in Iboih which around 4km from hotel, to go there need car which cost Rp 150k. The hotel do not have catalogue what activity guest need to do while we stay here, no list of snorkeling cost or what time to go or where to go, this hotel is just room to sleep, nothing more.

reviews.reviewTitle: Good Design Hotel beside the Beach
reviews.reviewPositives: Black Sand Beach, smooth wave, nice sunset

reviews.reviewComments:
went into pade reading alot of reviews and fully expected some of the issues that were raised by other reviews. 

if you want a secluded spot on pulau weh that sits on the western side, you will enjoy the almost 24/7 winds from the indian ocean, its so breezy that it was sort of calming at the same time. the pade is secluded from everything else, so go if you want your own quiet time.

reviews.reviewTitle: A REST AFTER BUSY DAY BUT THE BEACH TOO MUCH STONE
reviews.reviewComments: FIRST I WAS THINK GOING TO SEE THE CLEAR BEACH BUT WHEN ALREADY CHECK IN I JUST SEE THAT FOR REACH THE BEACH SHOULD WALK ABOUT 5 MINUTE AGAIN
reviews.reviewPositives: LOCATION, ROOM SPACE AND NICE VIEW

reviews.reviewComments:
Room: We booked an Ocean View Room, it was small but clean. It has aircon and TV with good choice of program (HBO, Fox, etc.)

Meal: The breakfast buffet had good variants and well organized. The ala carte menu for dinner is also delicious but quite pricey. Fish&Chips, Sup Buntut Goreng & Nasi Goreng Kampung are our favorites.

Staff: Staff members are friendly and polite. They are quite helpful. 

Activity: You can arrange for snorkelling or diving trip from the resort. We took Discovery Scuba Diving with Igor as our instructor. He is definitely the best! Ask for him!
reviews.reviewPositives: Friendly Staff, Comfortable Room, Good Food

reviews.reviewComments: the best resort i ever stay in Sabang. the staff were attentive, the room condition was excellent and the wifi was good. though the location is not at the nicest beach, but iboih is reachable within 10 minutes motorcycle ride. the food served in this hotel was good. no complaints at all. definitely will stay again.
ok
No signal even used wifi, very long road to stay there

reviews.reviewTitle: A not so pleasant stay at The Pade Dive Resort
reviews.reviewComments:
A not so pleasant stay at The Pade Dive Resort due to several reason:
1. I got hair in my Nasi Goreng (Fried Rice) Seafood after I had to wait for MERELY 40 minutes. the staff offered me a new plate of food, but to wait for at least another 30 minutes, I would say a big NO.
2. The place is so far away from any shops. You better buy your foods/drinks/snacks before check in.
3. Just wondering, why the room has no hook/cupboard/chest drawer (or whatever you call it) to hang your clothes. I had no idea where to put my clothes and used towel.
4. Even though my room is quite spacious, but the resort just leave it empty with no furniture such as sofa, coffee table etc. Inside there is only 1 king bed,1 stool and a long table to put the telephone, glasses and note pads.
5. the TV size is really small. I think it is 14 or 15" only.
6. The wooden floor at the veranda is not in good condition. due to weather, rain or shine and lack of maintenance, you got a crack floor. pretty dangerous
7. overall, not worth the money that I paid.
reviews.reviewPositives: The place is very quiet, the room is spacious and good lighting

reviews.reviewTitle: It was a very natural stay
reviews.reviewPositives: Just in front of the ocean made the short stay worth to do. A very nice dive master is very helpful to make the trip is just worth

reviews.reviewTitle: Nice architecture but overpriced and noisy
reviews.reviewComments:
as a diver I picked up this hotel because it is the best on the island. The problem is that the rooms are poorly insulated against noise and that there is a lot of resonance and as soon as there are kids around the place is very noisy. 4 times I was woken up by children crying or shouting in the hallways wich is a pain when you dive because you need to rest. It ruined my holidays. The food is just awful. The breakfast is minimal and the cofee is American wich is a riot in a place like Sumatra. The tv is very small and looks more like a cheap PC screen than a tv.
The staff is very nice and friendly and the room service,is top class. It is the noise really that I did not like

Close to the beach, where you can snorkel with nice and beautiful coral. Clams, stone-fish, rays, eels, prawns, lion-fish etc..... Water is so clear!!
Diving centre, contact the staff for arrangement, not pricey, and diving boat just at the beach, no need to travel a long way.
The food in restaurant is delicious, though not many choices.
Contact the staff for renting a scooter-bike, you better have a scooter-bike to travel around, and it was really nice to go around the island.
The ferry to/from Aceh seems not following the schedule, better keep updating with staff. The fast ferry is much better than slow one, as it takes less than 1 hour, but the temperature is so low inside....FREEZING! For the slow ferry, it takes 2 hours and the condition and ventilation is really poor.
Choose the room at the corner, as that will be quieter.
Nice, relaxing hotel with comfortable rooms. Not in walking distance to any major attractions.

reviews.reviewTitle: A diving holiday at its best
reviews.reviewComments: I was the only guest in this hotel for 3 nights. The hotel staff was very accommodative,starting with the dive day itself where we had gone out for 3 dives at the Canyon, Arus Balik and Balee Tokong, down to 35 metres deep. The dive instructor, Igor is a gem as he was careful, calm and very knowledgeable of dive area. We had our lunch and surface time at the nearby coral covered Iboih beach. Igor and the hotel staff were very accommodative to show me around Weh island with sights there were breath taking, to say the least. I had stayed in the ocean view room and spoilt by the awesome sunset and sound of crashing waves at night. The room itself is very comfortable, with fast wifi and good quality breakfast and dinner selection. A must stay if you want to treat yourself to memorable diving experience

The view is amazing because it is by the beach. The room is also clean, food is good, friendly staff. However the location is quite far from the harbour. So it will take longer to reach the airport. But it is a great place to do diving because the water is clear so it will be so beautiful to enjoy the view under the sea.
reviews.reviewPositives: Nice View, Clean Room, Friendly Staff

reviews.reviewComments: I am overall happy with my stay even though it is a bit out from the beach.

our little family enjoyed the resort, although the beach right in front is not fit for kids playing because it's rocky. Iboih beach is just 5-minutes drive from the resort, where you can do snorkeling there and Rubiah island which is just across
reviews.reviewPositives: friendly staff, excellent room condition, 5 mins drive to beach

reviews.reviewComments: it was good!and i love to stay for a week. i enjoy with my friends

What a great hotel! This hotel is very beautiful. I had a spectacular night watching sunset in this hotel. The food was great. The breakfast was good. The fried oxtail soup tasted so great. Diving in Sabang is also a must. This hotel can organize your diving trip professionally. Overall I really enjoyed my staying. I will come back here again for sure!
the staff is friendly and helpful, room is clean and comfortable with unique terrace, the view is great, a good place to relax

after having spent two nights at the pade dive resort, we were so pleased with our stay we decided to extend for another night.  as was the case our first two nights spent there, we were the only guests on the premises and we were especially well-treated.  the staff went out of their way to accommodate us when we needed to have our rental car placed in line for the ferry the night before our departure, making all necessary arrangements then taking us into sabang the following morning.  this resort is a true "gem" and we would not hesitate to return in the future.
reviews.reviewPositives: Quiet, serene, remote resort with spectacular ocean views

reviews.reviewComments: We chose to stay at the Pade Dive Resort as the result of having had a very positive experience staying at the Pade Hotel in Banda Aceh for two nights prior to this reservation.....and we were not disappointed.  Our positive experience is probably due, at least in part, to the fact that we were the only guests staying at the resort the entire stay.  We had a beautiful oceanview room with a large balcony from which we could enjoy the evening sunsets.  Upon our arrival, the staff asked if we would like to have chairs and a table on our balcony and these were immediately provided.  The room was new, clean and very functional.  If we had to provide any negative comments, they would be that the room was fairly dark in the evening and that on our night of arrival, the food available in the restaurant was limited with no beer available at all.  This was, however, rectified the following day.  Given the opportunity, we would definitely return to The Pade Dive Resort in the future

The pade dive resort is real resort that can make feel calm, relax and happy. I can rest from my busy activity, so quite. I like the view from my room. The great sunset i've ever seen. My son enjoy the little beach. My wife enjoy the terrace from our room at night, so romantic. I took the picture of pade, and many of my friends interesting to stay in pade. Above of all, pade is the great choice to visit sabang. We'll come again, pade..
I loved the hotel,nespecially the view, but there is no white sand beach.
i was stay for 1 night but it was great hotel with ocean view and we can the firsh upper the land and it was very clean water at sea
clean and nice room, the staff is friendly and helpful
the view is nice, but the
Hotel bagus, tapi jauh lokasinya dari kota, dekat dengan iboh. Untuk pasangan atau yang mencari ketenangan cocok. Untuk main di pantai agak kurang, karena banyak batu, untuk sunset bagus

reviews.originalComment: Pelayanan ok.. Viewnya gausah diragukan lagi.. Agak jauh dr pusat kota.. Kalo mau ke hotel mesti stok cemilan n makanan
reviews.reviewComments: The service is good.. The view is unquestionable.. A bit far from the city center.. If you want to go to the hotel, you need to stock up on snacks and food.
Es un hotel muy bueno por lo que hay en la isla, esta no es la mejor época para ese lado de la isla
accueil sympathique, personnel charmant,et arrangeant,le club de plongée a proximité est parfait je recommande cet établissement
Leider zu abgelegenen und kein richtiges Speiseangebot. Personal sehr nett und bemüht. Zum Tauchen optimal aber sonst eher nicht.

reviews.reviewTitle: Preis und Leistungen passen nicht zusammen
reviews.reviewComments: ACHTUNG!! Das Angebot im Internet hat nichts mit dem  zu tun was einen dann in Wirklichkeit erwartet.

ひたすらのんびりするのに最高。
ベッドのスプリングも柔らかすぎず固すぎず。何よりアジア系メニューのご飯が美味しい。
reviews.reviewPositives: ご飯が美味しい、静か、テラスから海がすぐ、風の具合がちょうどよい

reviews.reviewComments: Terbaik Dan akan datang lagi dng Bini muda hahahahaha 👍

pade位置很僻静，很私密，酒店内环境也不错。交通稍微不便，但是在岛的西边，天气好的话，可以在海边看日落。
这里要特别感谢酒店的员工还有司机Lulu，我朋友骑车摔了，他们都非常热情的帮忙，还特意买来水果慰问我们，让我们很是感动！
在此我们表示由衷的感谢！谢谢你们！
Dear Pade team, many thanks for all you've done for us, especially for taking care of my friends！

pade位置很僻静，很私密，酒店内环境也不错。交通稍微不便，但是在岛的西边，天气好的话，可以在海边看日落。
这里要特别感谢酒店的员工还有司机Lulu，我朋友骑车摔了，他们都非常热情的帮忙，还特意买来水果慰问我们，让我们很是感动！
在此我们表示由衷的感谢！谢谢你们！
Dear Pade team, many thanks for all you've done for us, especially for taking care of my friends！

reviews.reviewTitle: 자연이 회손 대지 않은 경관과 가족적인 투숙객 그리고 종웝원 서비스 좋음 그러나 식당 음식
reviews.reviewComments:
식당의 음식을 제왜하고 모든것이 마음에 듬
도로 입구에 호텔 이정표가 없어서 호텔을 찾는데 애를 먹음
reviews.reviewPositives: 1. 종업원 서비스 좋음 2. 방에서 바라보는 해변 경관 최상  3. 호텔시설 깨꿋하고 쾌적함

reviews.reviewComments:
酒店在韦岛的西侧的海边，临海但是不好下水，因为都是礁石风浪也较大，周围没有饭店只能在酒店吃，走出去10分钟能路过个很小的市场买一些饮料日用品什么的，去景点或者潜水只能租车去，好处是环境很美也很安静，适合休闲游。
酒店的员工都很NICE，服务态度一级棒，回城的时候把我们送到码头后，还帮拿行李上船安排好座位才走。
总体来说帕德潜水度假村在韦岛上算数一数二的好了，值得推荐！

酒店在韦岛的西侧的海边，临海但是不好下水，因为都是礁石风浪也较大，周围没有饭店只能在酒店吃，走出去10分钟能路过个很小的市场买一些饮料日用品什么的，去景点或者潜水只能租车去，好处是环境很美也很安静，适合休闲游。
酒店的员工都很NICE，服务态度一级棒，回城的时候把我们送到码头后，还帮拿行李上船安排好座位才走。
总体来说帕德潜水度假村在韦岛上算数一数二的好了，值得推荐！
这里位置较偏 但也显得安静 完全是包岛的感觉 风景非常棒 但海只能看不能下水 海浪大礁石多不适合游泳 在当地显得价格较高 这里应设个泳池就配得上这个价位了！
选择这家旅店度假一定会后悔

reviews.reviewTitle: 韦岛上仅次于韦岛度假村的酒店
reviews.reviewComments: 1.员工都非常Nice,服务意识很好！2.海景房的阳台很棒，晚上坐在阳台的椅子上，吹着海风，听着海浪声，非常惬意 一次很愉快的旅行
reviews.reviewPositives: 服务好  海景房的阳台很棒

reviews.reviewTitle: 位置略偏，如果外韦岛潜水住在这里略微不方便。员工都很友善很负责。
reviews.reviewPositives: 员工友善，位置略偏，建议到怡宝海滩租摩托车出行。

reviews.reviewComments: Baik

reviews.reviewTitle: Tempat Sepi, Staf Ramah, Wisata Goa Sarang
reviews.reviewComments: Resort yang berlokasi cukup jauh dari keramaian, namun memiliki akses langsung ke pantai. Suasana cukup tenang dengan hanya suara deburan ombak, staf yang sangat ramah, cocok untuk orang yang ingin menenangkan diri dari kesibukannya. Info penting lainnya yaitu sinyal komunikasi telepon susah didapati, hanya mengandalkan wifi resort yang cukup baik.
Dengan lokasi yg ada, mungkin ini hotel yg paling nyaman

reviews.reviewTitle: Ada pembohongan terhadap  klasifikasi bintang hote
reviews.reviewComments: Tidak senyaman yg dibayangkan
reviews.reviewPositives: Karna lokasi jauh dr kota/permukiman makanya tidak bising

reviews.reviewComments: Staffnya, Makanannya, Hotelnya Nyaman!

Overall nya sih oke2 aja. Pas kita nyampe kamarnya baru dibersihin. Namanya baru dibersihin harusnya kan bersih, ini lantainya sedikit lengket, dan toiletnya ada tertinggal 'suatu' kotoran -.- ya bs dibilang utk cleaning service nya not really good. Dan pas kita sarapan, kita pesan sunny-side utk 10 orang, tapi ada yg pesan 2 porsi, gara2 itu dihitung jd 11 orang yg sarapan di kita di charge. It's not a big problem for us, but how they react when we ordered things just... Errggh, gemesin aja.. Oh, jalan buat ke lautnya bebatuan gitu, dan sedikit sulit kalau jalan menggunakan sandal, apalagi anak2! Tapi if you want to stay with do nothing, ya recommended la. Tempatnya calm gt, cocok bt refreshing dr kepenatan hiruk pikuk kota. ;)
reviews.reviewPositives: Design hotel, peralatan yang digunakan di dalam kamar bagus, suasana yang tenang

reviews.reviewComments: kamar yg bagus sehingga nyaman buat beristirahan dan lokasih pemandangan kamarnya cukup bagus
